Why Choose Novacloud47?

Pakistan's most reliable automated investment platform

01

Instant Earnings

0.20% per hour credited to your earning wallet every hour automatically.

How It Works

Start earning in 4 simple steps

1

Create Account

Register with name, email, and phone. Activation is instant.

2

Make Deposit

Choose EasyPaisa, JazzCash, or Bank. Send PKR, get USD in deposit wallet.

3

Invest Funds

Go to Invest section, enter amount, click Invest Now. Earnings start instantly.

4

Withdraw Anytime

Cash out to EasyPaisa, JazzCash, Bank, or Binance whenever you want.

❓ FAQ

How do I deposit?

Go to Deposit page, enter amount in PKR, select EasyPaisa/JazzCash/Bank, send money to given account, then enter your Transaction ID and submit.

When do earnings start?

Earnings start only when you click Invest Now and invest your deposit. Simply depositing does not start earnings — you must invest first.

What is the minimum withdrawal?

EasyPaisa/JazzCash: $0.10. Bank Transfer/Binance: $1.00.
